verdict_reason: Voice matches the chapter-2 brief — didactic, corrective, slightly stern. The engineering layer's stance ('the engineering body explicitly forecloses the loose effort/passion/flow readings') is the kind of clear-not-sneering correction the chapter calls for. The mid-level-engineer contrast is firm but not cruel. Sanskrit terminology is invoked (kauśalam, samatvam, buddhi-yukta, sukṛta-duṣkṛte) without becoming pedantic. Tone matches 2.45-2.49 (the surrounding shipped or in-block verses). Pass.
